lanes.scope: Pure Rust modules and React utility surfaces
Local process with embedded SQLite and in-process event bus

must_prove: no secret values in logs or audit exports
adapters route all effects through policy.
replay cannot duplicate committed side effects
lanes.scope: Secrets, approvals, audit, and adapter boundaries

must_prove: fixtures are committed or generated from declared zones
tests do not depend on remote services by default
paper claims map to tests or design decisions

minimum_bar: CI-local parity with deterministic unit, integration, replay, protocol, security, and operations tests.

AGENTS.md.purpose: verify root routing remains visible to the audit

AGENT_WORK_PLAN.md.purpose: verify the work plan remains routed

README.md.purpose: verify the workspace readme remains routed

.agents/.purpose: verify generated agent scaffolding stays routed and reviewable

.artifacts/.purpose: verify generated artifacts remain outside the authored surface

.claude/.purpose: verify Claude-facing instruction scaffolding remains routed

.cursor/.purpose: verify cursor rules remain routed and reviewable

.editorconfig.purpose: verify repository editor policy stays parseable

.env.example.purpose: verify sample environment config remains routed

telegram.env.purpose: verify Telegram environment config remains routed

.github/copilot-instructions.md.purpose: verify GitHub Copilot instructions remain reviewable

.github/instructions/.purpose: verify GitHub instruction bundles remain routed

.github/workflows/.purpose: verify GitHub workflow automation stays routed through the security lane

.jeryu/.purpose: verify local Jeryu configuration stays routed

README-jankurai-scaffold.md.purpose: verify scaffold marker does not hide missing control-plane files

Cargo.lock.purpose: verify Cargo lockfile routing remains visible

Cargo.toml.purpose: verify workspace manifest routing remains visible

CHANGELOG.md.purpose: verify the changelog remains part of the release proof surface

Justfile.purpose: verify the local build graph remains routed

agent/.purpose: verify manifests remain parseable and authoritative

agent/audit-policy.toml.purpose: verify structured runtime and control-plane event policy remains routed

agent/proof-lanes.toml.purpose: verify proof-lane coverage stays aligned with the control-plane proof surface

docs/agent-native-standard.md.purpose: verify the agent-native standard remains routed

docs/testing.md.purpose: verify testing guidance and adversarial fixture coverage remain routed

docs/release.md.purpose: verify release gate guidance remains routed

docs/release-process.md.purpose: verify release process docs remain part of the local proof surface

docs/boundaries.md.purpose: verify boundary guidance stays aligned with manifests and contract checks

docs/generated-zones.md.purpose: verify generated-zone guidance stays aligned with generator manifests

docs/audit-rubric.md.purpose: verify audit rule guidance remains agent-readable

docs/ide-integrations.md.purpose: verify IDE integration guidance remains routed

agent/coverage-sources.toml.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score
agent/coverage-sources.toml.purpose: verify coverage evidence source routing and score import

agent/zyal/.purpose: verify canonical ZYAL runbooks stay under agent/zyal and only use the .zyal extension

apps/.purpose: verify app surfaces remain routed through the audit

apps/web/.purpose: verify the rendered UX proof host and accessibility checks

packages/ux-qa/.purpose: verify the local Jankurai UX QA verifier and rendered evidence receipts

package-lock.json.purpose: verify the npm lockfile stays routed

package.json.purpose: verify the npm manifest stays routed

rust-toolchain.toml.purpose: verify the pinned Rust toolchain stays routed

schemas/jitux/.command: cargo test -p jmcp-domain jitux --locked && just fast-json && just contract-drift
schemas/jitux/.purpose: verify the JITUX Mission Deck frame schema and domain frame contract

schemas/jcp/1.0.0/jcp.schema.json.purpose: verify the JCP schema remains routed

schemas/jpcm/1.0.0/jpcm.schema.json.purpose: verify the JPCM schema remains routed

schemas/repair-queue.schema.json.purpose: verify the repair queue receipt schema remains parseable

scripts/ci-local.sh.purpose: verify CI local parity script routing

contracts/.purpose: advisory contract drift scan until project-specific contract checks exist

paper/jmcp-v1-architecture-security-repr.purpose: verify the final paper source remains routed

python/ai-service/AGENTS.md.purpose: verify the Python service guidance remains routed

contracts/events/.purpose: verify event contract sources stay in the declared surface

agent/repo-score-baseline.json.purpose: verify the committed score baseline stays aligned with audit policy

crates/.purpose: verify Rust behavior and audit checks

crates/jmcp-conformance/src/lib.rs.purpose: verify deterministic conformance fixtures remain routable

crates/jmcp-conformance/tests/jcp_v1.rs.purpose: verify JCP v1 conformance fixtures and adversarial cases remain routable

crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score
crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.purpose: verify coverage parsers and evidence normalization

crates/jankurai/src/commands/coverage.rs.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score

db/constraints/.purpose: advisory constraint-lane health check until DB proof exists

db/migrations/.purpose: advisory control-plane health check until migration tests exist

docs/architecture/.purpose: verify architecture docs remain visible to the audit

docs/decisions/.purpose: verify decision records remain visible to the audit

docs/COVERAGE_*.md.purpose: verify coverage evidence docs remain routed

ops/.purpose: verify ops surfaces remain visible to the audit
